e2_sentence: I also  heard the Prophet saying, "The institution of Hima is invalid except for Allah  and His Apostle.

e1_sentence: The Prophet passed by me at a place called Al-Abwa or Waddan, and was asked  whether it was permissible to attack the pagan warriors at night with the  probability of exposing their women and children to danger

e2_sentence: The Prophet  replied, "They (i.e. women and children) are from them (i.e. pagans).
